en: Pay respects to my dear late brother, and they compound an already traumatic and painful trip with this humiliation.
ko: 고인의 형에게 경의를 표하며, 이미 힘든 여행에 이 굴욕까지 더해지다니.

en: The timing does seem particularly unfortunate.
The agreement between Bertie and me was that I would give up everything and go into exile,
ko: 버티와의 합의는 내가 모든 것을 포기하고 망명하겠다는 것이었고,

en: and keep a low profile in return for a pension that was clearly meant to be for the term of my whole life, not his.
ko: 내 평생을 위한 연금과 맞바꾸는 것이었습니다. 그의 것이 아니라.

en: Now he's barely cold, and Cookie turns off the bloody tap. How dare she?
ko: 이제 겨우 차가워졌는데, 쿠키가 그 끔찍한 지원을 끊다니. 어떻게 감히!

en: Oh, you don't know that it was her. Of course it was her.
ko: 그녀가 그랬다는 걸 모르시겠어요? 물론 그녀가 그랬죠.

en: Why not? She's fat, common, and looks like a cook.
ko: 왜 안 되죠? 그녀는 뚱뚱하고 평범하며 요리사처럼 생겼어요.

en: Oh, that it would appear insensitive for a member of the extended royal family to be seen to be rewarded and live in luxury.
ko: 왕실의 확장된 가족 구성원이 보상받고 사치스럽게 사는 것은 무감각해 보일 것이라고요.

en: Extended royal family? I was the most senior member of that family, the king.
ko: 확장된 왕실 가족? 나는 그 가족의 가장 고위 구성원이었어요, 왕이었죠.

en: Now, we barely make ends meet. Every day is a struggle. You live in great...
ko: 이제 우리는 간신히 생계를 유지하고 있어요. 매일이 힘든 싸움입니다. 당신은 훌륭한...
